'''Aurek Team''' ({{Aur|a}} Team) and [[Bacta Team]] were military units tasked by Mace Windu with [[Hunt for Darth Sidious|locating Darth Sidious on Coruscant]]. Windu put together what he considered a dream team that consisted of ARC commander [[Valiant (clone trooper)|Valiant]], [[Dyne|Captain Dyne]] of [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]], Jedi Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], several capable [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]], and several [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]]. The commandos reported directly to Valiant. At one point, Mace split up these teams with him taking Aurek, Dyne, and Valiant, and [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Jedi General]] [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] taking Bacta. The search was focused in [[The Works/Legends|Sector 943]], also known as "the Works". Aurek Team, minus Windu, did manage to eventually uncover the identity of [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], but they were immediately [[Death/Legends|killed]] by him. Never learning the truth of Darth Sidious' identity, the Jedi assumed that Aurek team had been killed during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]].<ref name="LoE" />
